name: Smart Poster Grid
description: Generate one consistent poster across 4 social aspect ratios (1:1, 3:4, 9:16, 16:9) in a single call. Reuses poster-maker's templates and Pillow renderer.

description_i18n.zh: 一次生成 4 个社交尺寸（1:1 / 3:4 / 9:16 / 16:9）的同款海报，复用 poster-maker 的模板与 Pillow 渲染器。
description_i18n.en: Generate one consistent poster across 4 social aspect ratios (1:1, 3:4, 9:16, 16:9) in a single call. Reuses poster-maker's templates and Pillow renderer.

author: OpenAkita
